title: Warehouse Assistant
description:
We are seeking a dedicated Warehouse Associate to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for various aspects of warehouse operations, including receiving, storing, handling, shipping, and preparing products for customer delivery. Your primary focus will be maintaining a safe and orderly warehouse environment.


Responsibilities:

  • Receive and review daily orders from the Warehouse Supervisor/Manager.
  • Efficiently pull, pack, and ship orders within specified timeframes.
  • Maintain accurate inventory controls by recording stock location orders and tracking material quantities through our computer system. You may also assist with physical inventory counts.
  • Collaborate closely with Customer Services, Sales, and external partners to ensure seamless operations.
  • Promptly report any potential risks, issues, or product defects to the Warehouse Supervisor/Manager.
  • Keep work areas clean and organized, including shelves, pallet areas, and workstations. Adhere to all procedures, rules, and safety regulations.
  • As the position evolves, you may take on additional duties or special projects as assigned by management.

Requirements:


The ideal candidate will possess the following qualifications:

  • Minimum GCE N Level or equivalent.
  • Prior experience in warehousing is preferred, but we also welcome candidates without direct experience as training will be provided.
  • Physical fitness and ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.
  • Familiarity with operating equipment, including forklifts.
  • Strong attention to detail, excellent organizational skills, and effective time management.
  • Basic knowledge of computer systems and applications.
  • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication abilities.
  • Understanding of proper safety procedures, equipment maintenance, and best practices within a warehouse setting.

Join our team and contribute to our mission of delivering exceptional service to our customers! Apply today.

IGUS SINGAPORE PTE LTD

-Locations in 33 countries and partners in another 80 countries

Why join us?

Empower Success Together: At igus, we're driven by a shared purpose and guided by PERFFECT principles to enhance motion plastics, boost innovation, and create joy for customers. Join our community, where we prioritize your success, celebrate achievements, and foster a culture of respect and continuous improvement. Together, we'll light up the future of motion plastics.
